relabelled_senses.definition: Literally, 'for not to speak of'; used to introduce something that has not been mentioned.
Literally, 'by the work of'; used to attribute an event or result to the action of a person or a divine agent.
Literally, 'by the work and grace of'; used to attribute an outcome to the work and grace of God or a divine power.

literal: for reference; as a point of information or consultation rather than as definitive or binding information
everywhere; in all places; throughout a wide area
in a grand, lavish, or extravagant manner; with great pomp or celebration
everywhere; on all sides; in every direction or throughout a place

relabelled_senses.definition: Literally, by a hair; indicating a very small physical distance or amount.

literal: on account of a trivial matter; over something insignificant or petty
for one time only; on this single occasion

relabelled_senses.definition: Literal justification meaning 'because today is the current day', used to state the obvious or to reference the present day as the reason for something.

literal: to pay attention; to focus one’s listening or observation on something or someone

relabelled_senses.definition: The principal bullfighter of a bullfighting company; the lead matador who performs the most important role in a bullfight.
A fictional, idealized prince character from fairy tales, typically depicted as a rescuer or romantic hero.

literal: it may be that; it is possible that

relabelled_senses.definition: Literally, 'in a position to specify': indicating that one is ready or in a position to provide a more precise statement or detail.
Literally 'fifth-rate whore': an insulting expression denoting someone of low worth or poor quality, used as a derogatory epithet.
